REMITTITUR FILED THE COURT REVERSES THE JUDGMENT DISMISSING APPELLANT'S COM- PLAINT AND REMANDS THE MATTER TO THE TRIAL COURT WITH DIRECT IONS THAT IT VACATE ITS ORDER DISMISSING THE ACTION & ISSUE AN ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER TO APPELLANT SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MALICIOUS PROSECUTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
